title: GH #27.1: heartbeat-invariant claim counting via immutable acquired_at
action: Per D-GHF-B: 1) claims.mjs — stamp acquired_at (utcNow) once when a claim file is first created; renewClaimTTL must preserve it verbatim (it spreads the claim, so only ensure it never overwrites acquired_at). 2) cells.mjs appendAttempt (~:157) — ledger entries gain acquired_at: claim.acquired_at ?? claim.claimed_at ?? null (keep claimed_at field as-is for compat). 3) checkCellBudgets (~:1176-1180) — pair key becomes claim_session + (acquired_at ?? claimed_at); legacy entries without acquired_at count exactly as today. 4) Tests: test_heartbeat_touch.mjs — renewal preserves acquired_at; two failed attempts with a heartbeat renewal between them count as ONE acquisition pair. test_claim_race.mjs stays green. Run onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply to sync mirrors. Commit: fix(budget): heartbeat no longer inflates claim count (GH #27) [ghf-3].

truths: one claim + N heartbeats + M attempts = 1 counted acquisition

verify: node scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs && node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

trace.outcome: GH #27.1 fixed: claims.mjs stamps immutable acquired_at at claim creation, cells.mjs pairs on (claim_session, acquired_at ?? claimed_at) so heartbeat renewals no longer inflate claims_used; checkCellBudgets exported for direct test assertion
trace.verify_output: 29 rows 0 failing (heartbeat_touch incl new hb-budget case); claim_race PASS a-d; test_lib 400 passed 0 failed; mirror 23+10 files byte-identical
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs && node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

checks.evidence: claims.mjs:+292 stamps acquired_at once; checkCellBudgets pairs on (claim_session, acquired_at ?? claimed_at); hb-budget case max_claims=2 green (29 rows/0)
appendAttempt + pair key use acquired_at ?? claimed_at fallback; test_lib 409/0
renewClaimTTL spread keeps acquired_at; stability case passes
claimed_at kept verbatim everywhere; acquired_at purely additive
plan.md Approach item 3 matches diff exactly (label nit: cell cites D-GHF-B, plan uses same name in Approach — no scope drift)
